name: BlackLine Systems, Inc.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eight decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does BlackLine Systems operate in India?
faq.a: BlackLine Systems operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does BlackLine Systems have GCC centers in?
faq.a: BlackLine Systems's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does BlackLine Systems run in India?
faq.a: BlackLine Systems runs R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at BlackLine Systems's India GCCs?
faq.a: BlackLine Systems's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads BlackLine Systems's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 8 leaders at BlackLine Systems's India centers, across IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
